description: A green field charged in the centre with the municipal coat of arms of Curitiba.
history: Curitiba's flag is one of the official symbols of the city — together with its coat of arms and anthem — and was officially adopted on 11 May 1967 under Municipal Law No. 2,993. The proportions are 7:10. The coat of arms references the Araucária pine that dominates the Paraná plateau and gives the city much of its iconography; the green field reflects Curitiba's reputation as a green and ecologically planned capital.

features.symbolism: the green field of the flag, evoking the Araucária pine forests around the city

features.role: coat of arms of the Municipality of Curitiba
features.symbolism: the city's coat of arms, featuring the Araucária pine and other emblems of the Paraná plateau and of Curitiba's foundation
